mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_session (session_id, employee_id, department_id, status, context_json, created_at, updated_at, closed_at) VALUES (#{session.sessionId}, #{session.employeeId}, #{session.departmentId}, #{session.status}, #{contextJson}, #{session.createdAt}, #{session.updatedAt}, #{session.closedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT session_id, employee_id, department_id, status, context_json, created_at, updated_at, closed_at FROM t_session WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
